nodes.title: 7.1 Product Manager Skills
nodes.text:
<physical_index_5>
## 7.1 Product Manager Skills

Product Execution: JIRA, Confluence, Productboard, Linear, Notion, Monday.com

Design & Research: Figma, Miro, UserTesting, Dovetail, Maze, Hotjar

Analytics: SQL (intermediate), Amplitude, Mixpanel, Google Analytics, Heap, Looker

Frameworks: Agile/Scrum, JTBD, OKRs, RICE Prioritization, ICE Scoring, Design Thinking

Experimentation: A/B Testing, Feature Flags (LaunchDarkly), Hypothesis Framing

Domain: B2B SaaS / Payments / Marketplace / Consumer / API Products (list what applies)
<physical_index_5>

nodes.title: 7.2 Project Manager Skills
nodes.text:
<physical_index_5>
## 7.2 Project Manager Skills

Methodologies: Agile (Scrum, Kanban), Waterfall, PRINCE2, PMP, Six Sigma (Green Belt)

PM Tools: MS Project, Smartsheet, JIRA, Asana, Monday.com, Trello, Wrike

Reporting & Docs: Confluence, SharePoint, Power BI (reporting), Excel (advanced), Visio

Programme Skills: Budget Management, Risk & Issue Logs, RAID, Change Control, RACI

Stakeholder Mgmt: Executive Steering Committees, Vendor Management, Contract Negotiation
<physical_index_5>

<physical_index_6>
Domain: IT Delivery / Digital Transformation / Infrastructure / ERP / Change Management
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 7.3 Customer Success Manager Skills
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 7.3 Customer Success Manager Skills

CRM & CS Platforms: Salesforce, HubSpot, Gainsight, ChurnZero, Totango, Planhat

Communication: Executive QBRs, EBRs, Success Plans, Renewal Playbooks, Stakeholder Mapping

Analytics: Salesforce Reporting, Looker, Tableau, Excel (advanced), Health Score Modelling

CS Frameworks: SPICED, MEDDIC, Customer Health Scoring, Expansion Plays, Churn Prevention

Product Knowledge: Product Adoption Tracking, Onboarding Design, Feature Advocacy, VOC Programs

Domain: HR Tech / Fintech / DevTools / Martech / CX (list your actual domain)

- Avoid generic soft skill clusters like 'Communication, Leadership, Teamwork' — every candidate lists these. Your bullets must prove soft skills; never claim them in the skills section.
- For PM and CS: if you can write SQL for analysis, say so. 'SQL (intermediate queries for product analytics)' is a meaningful differentiator in a field where most candidates cannot query data independently.

PART 8 - WORK EXPERIENCE (PM / PjM / CS)
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.1 Role Header Format
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.1 Role Header Format

Senior Product Manager | Company Name (Series B B2B SaaS, 180 employees) | Jul 2021 – Present

City, Country (or 'Remote')
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.2 The PM Bullet Framework
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.2 The PM Bullet Framework

STRUCTURE: [Action Verb] + [What product/feature/initiative] + [Cross-functional context / decision method] + [User / business outcome]

EXAMPLE: Defined and launched a self-serve onboarding flow (PRD → Figma → A/B test, n=12K users), reducing median time-to-first-value from 9 days to 22 hours and increasing D30 retention by 14 percentage points.
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.3 The PjM Bullet Framework
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.3 The PjM Bullet Framework

STRUCTURE: [Action Verb] + [Project name / type + scale: budget, team size] + [Delivery context: on-time, under-budget, specific challenge overcome] + [Business outcome]

EXAMPLE: Delivered a $4.8M Salesforce CRM implementation for 1,200-user financial services firm across 3 countries, 5 weeks ahead of schedule and 11% under budget, enabling a consolidated 360 customer view that reduced average customer onboarding time by 8 days.
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.4 The CS Bullet Framework
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.4 The CS Bullet Framework

STRUCTURE: [Action Verb] + [What CS motion: QBR / health monitoring / onboarding / renewal / upsell] + [Account context: ARR, segment, number of accounts] + [Retention or expansion outcome]

EXAMPLE: Developed and executed a structured 90-day onboarding programme for 12 new enterprise accounts ($2.4M combined ARR), achieving 94% feature adoption by day 90 and reducing time-to-first-value from 6 weeks to 18 days.
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.6 Strong Action Verb Banks
nodes.text:
<physical_index_7>
## 8.6 Strong Action Verb Banks

PM: Defined • Launched • Shipped • Prioritized • Drove • Aligned • Synthesized • Designed • Led • Spearheaded • Championed • Reduced • Increased • Improved • Accelerated • Validated

PjM: Delivered • Managed • Led • Coordinated • Executed • Negotiated • Oversaw • Structured • Mitigated • Resolved • Governed • Facilitated • Tracked • Reported • Streamlined

CS: Managed • Grew • Retained • Expanded • Onboarded • Renewed • Recovered • Developed • Drove • Executed • Facilitated • Built • Partnered • Identified • Reduced
<physical_index_7>

nodes.title: 8.7 Before vs. After — PM / PjM / CS Bullets
nodes.text:
<physical_index_7>
## 8.7 Before vs. After — PM / PjM / CS Bullets
<physical_index_7>

nodes.title: 9.1 Product Manager
nodes.text:
<physical_index_8>
## 9.1 Product Manager

- CSPO (Certified Scrum Product Owner) — widely recognized, especially in Agile-first organizations.
- PSPO (Professional Scrum Product Owner) — Scrum.org’s version, considered more rigorous than CSPO.
- Product School Certificate — recognized by some companies, not universally respected. Less weight than CSPO/PSPO.
- Reforge Programs (Growth, Retention, Experimentation) — strong signal at growth-stage tech companies. Highly respected by senior PMs.
- Technical: SQL for Product Managers (Mode Analytics / Coursera), Google Analytics Certification — differentiating for data-driven PM roles.
<physical_index_8>

nodes.title: 9.2 Project Manager
nodes.text:
<physical_index_8>
## 9.2 Project Manager

- PMP (Project Management Professional, PMI) — the gold standard globally. Strongest single credential for senior PjM roles.
- PRINCE2 Practitioner — essential for UK, Europe, Australia, and government/public sector projects. Less recognized in the US.
- CSM (Certified Scrum Master) — important for Agile delivery roles or organizations running Scrum-based projects.
- PMI-ACP (Agile Certified Practitioner) — for PjMs managing mixed Agile-Waterfall environments.
- Six Sigma Green Belt / Black Belt — strong for operational excellence, manufacturing, supply chain, and process improvement roles.
<physical_index_8>

nodes.title: 9.3 Customer Success
nodes.text:
<physical_index_8>
## 9.3 Customer Success

- CCSM (Certified Customer Success Manager, SuccessCoaching) — the most established CS-specific certification.
- Gainsight Certification (Gainsight University) — valuable signal for roles at companies using Gainsight as their CS platform.
- Salesforce Certified Administrator / Sales Cloud Consultant — strong for CS roles where Salesforce is the primary CRM.
- LinkedIn Learning CSM Foundations — low credential weight but signals intentional self-development at entry level.
- HubSpot Customer Success Certification — relevant for SMB and startup CS roles using the HubSpot ecosystem.

MENTORQUE • Product Management / Project Management / Customer Success Resume Blueprint
<physical_index_8>
